candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded

candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The annual net turnover excluding VAT of the company in the financial year, as referred to in article 1:26/1.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: has_non_standard_duration
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The financial year has an exceptional duration of less or more than twelve months.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: annual_average_employees

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: financial_year_duration_months
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The duration of the financial year in months, counting each started month as a full month.

secondary_diagnostics_text:
missing_helper_definition (legal-effect context=True):
  helper: adjusted_turnover_threshold (signature=FinancialYear -> Real; kind=threshold; hints=threshold)
  repair: define 'adjusted_turnover_threshold' in THEN with rules, or reclassify as case_input/background only if safe; do not rename without defining.
  threshold hint: prefer pairwise/conjunctive THEN definitions ((A&B) OR (A&C) OR (B&C)) for more-than-one helpers.
  threshold helper candidates:
    - employee_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - turnover_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - more_than_one_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - adjusted_turnover_threshold (helper)
  other lower-level symbols:
    - turnover_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - annual_net_turnover_excl_vat (observable)
    - employee_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - more_than_one_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - has_legal_personality (observable)
    - has_non_standard_duration (observable)
    - annual_average_employees (observable)
